root_cause.detail:
MLX is unavailable.

Import error:
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'mlx_lm'

This usually means MLX deps are not installed into the Python that Hub is using.

Fix (offline):
1) Run: offline_mlx_deps_py311/install_relflowhub_mlx_deps.command
2) If macOS blocks dlopen/system policy: run install_relflowhub_mlx_deps_system_python311.command instead
3) Hub Settings -> AI Runtime -> Stop, then Start

Note: Hub sets PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1, so pip --user (~/Library/Python/...) won't be used.
